name: Record ID
description: Adds a sequential Record ID column to the dataset, similar to Alteryx Record ID Tool. Supports grouping, sorting, and formatted incremental IDs.
output: Returns a DataFrame with a new Record ID column added.

fields.name: outputCol
fields.title: Output Column Name
fields.description: Name of the column that will contain generated Record IDs.

fields.name: startValue
fields.title: Starting Value
fields.description: The first value in the sequence. Default is 1.

fields.name: dataType
fields.title: Data Type
fields.description: Select the data type of the Record ID column.

fields.name: size
fields.title: Size (String Only)
fields.description: Applicable only when Data Type is String. Pads the value with leading zeros to match this length.

fields.name: position
fields.title: Column Position
fields.description: Position of the new column in the output DataFrame.

fields.name: generationScope
fields.title: Record ID Generation Scope
fields.description: Generate IDs across the entire dataset or restart numbering within each group.

fields.name: groupByCols
fields.title: Group By Columns
fields.description: Columns to group by when generating Record IDs within groups.

fields.name: orderByCols
fields.title: Order Rows Within Each Group
fields.description: Optional columns to define the order of rows within each group before numbering. Supports ascending or descending order.
